runs.explanation: The condition `if not clamp:` on line 71 is inverted. Clamping should occur when `clamp=True`, but the current code applies clamping when `clamp=False`, which is the opposite of the intended behavior.
runs.raw:
The bug is on line 71: the condition `if not clamp:` should be `if clamp:`. When `clamp=True`, the clamping logic should execute, but currently it executes when `clamp=False` (i.e., when clamping is disabled).
